name: HRM_PLANS
description: The plan table covers the basic information about the succession plan.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning

columns.Name: PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: The succession plan where the person is listed as an candidate.

columns.Name: PLAN_NAME
columns.Comments: Uniquely names the succession plan.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: A free format text area to describe the purpose of the succession plan.

columns.Name: PLAN_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the plan is incumbent, job, or position- based.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the succession plan.  The status determines what actions are allowed against the plan.

columns.Name: STATUS_REASON
columns.Comments: A list of values associated with the status field.

columns.Name: OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: The person who created and manages the succession plan.

columns.Name: OWNER_EDIT_ONLY
columns.Comments: A flag that indicates only the owner may update the succession plan.

columns.Name: PRIVATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates that only the Owner can view the succession plan.  Plans marked Private should also not be displayed in the search results for anyone other than the Owner.

columns.Name: ENABLE_ALERTS
columns.Comments: Enable alerts at plan level. The field supports upto 20 alerts to be enabled at plan level.

columns.Name: INCUMBENT_ROLE_CHANGE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to Y when incumbent role changes. Flag to N when user wants to remove the indication of role change.

columns.Name: ACCESS_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Access Type Code values that restrict the visibility of a Succession Plan

columns.Name: INCUMBENT_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: PERSON_ID of the plan incumbent.  The field is required if the plan is incumbent-based.

columns.Name: INCUMB_EXP_DEPART_REASON
columns.Comments: A list of pre-seeded reasons for departure.

columns.Name: INCUMB_EXP_DEPART_DATE
columns.Comments: The incumbent's expected departure date as a choice list.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Business Unit the plan is for

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Job Family the plan is for

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Job the plan is for

columns.Name: JOB_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Job Profile the plan is for

columns.Name: GRADE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Job Grade the plan is for

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Position the plan is for

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Department the plan is for

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY
columns.Comments: Source Key represents the object_id of source from where row is created or updated.

columns.Name: SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: Source code represents the source from were row is created or updated.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LATEST_RECORD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Latest record flag indicates the latest-active snapshot

columns.Name: OPERATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Operation Type which identifies types of operation, Create, Update or Delete

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Indicates the date on which plan was tracked

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Date to represents end date for the current snapshot.
